data.title: Fisher & Paykel Healthcare Executive Increases Stake via Employee Share Plan
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

Fisher & Paykel Healthcare Corporation Limited ( (NZ:FPH) ) has issued an update.

Fisher & Paykel Healthcare has disclosed that Vice President of Sales & Marketing Justin Peter Callahan increased his beneficial holding of ordinary shares through the company’s Employee Stock Purchase Plan. Callahan acquired 142 ordinary shares on 1 July 2026 at NZD 33.1882 per share, lifting his total beneficial holding to 221,009 ordinary shares.

The filing also confirms that Callahan retains substantial equity-based incentives, including 103,960 options to acquire ordinary shares and 64,091 performance share rights. The transaction underscores ongoing alignment between senior leadership and shareholders and signals continued use of equity participation to incentivise key executives within the company’s governance framework.

The most recent analyst rating on (NZ:FPH) stock is a Buy
with a N$37.60 price target.

Fisher & Paykel Healthcare Corporation Limited is a medical technology company focused on healthcare products, particularly respiratory care and related medical devices. The company participates in employee share and incentive schemes that align senior management and directors’ interests with those of shareholders, supporting long-term performance and retention.

data.title: Peer-reviewed study backs Critical Resources’ dry cathode manufacturing technology
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

Critical Resources Ltd ( (AU:CRR) ) has shared an update.

Critical Resources has secured independent, peer-reviewed validation of its optioned dry supersonic deposition cathode technology, with research published in Electrochimica Acta confirming a solvent- and binder-free, single-step manufacturing process. The study reports near-theoretical performance for lithium iron phosphate cathodes and strong durability over extended cycling, reinforcing the technical credibility of the company’s licensable IP.

The DSD process eliminates toxic solvents, polymer binders and energy-intensive drying ovens, promising lower costs, reduced energy use and environmental benefits compared with conventional slurry-based cathode manufacturing. This validation de-risks the technology and strengthens Critical Resources’ position to license its process, while ongoing work to integrate its proprietary solid electrolytes and scale to full-format pouch cells advances its ambitions in all-solid-state battery architectures.

More about Critical Resources Ltd

Critical Resources Limited is an ASX-listed company focused on battery materials and advanced manufacturing technologies, particularly in cathode and solid-state battery innovations. Rather than producing battery cells itself, the company aims to commercialise its intellectual property through a capital-light licensing and partnering model targeting global battery manufacturers.

YTD Price Performance: -9.09%

Average Trading Volume: 8,831,472

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: A$25.55M

data.title: Richly Field China Development Narrows Loss but Takes Heavy Impairments in 2026
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

Richly Field China Development Limited ( (HK:0313) ) has issued an announcement.

Richly Field China Development Limited reported a sharp decline in revenue to HK$41.9 million for the year ended 31 March 2026, down from HK$123.2 million a year earlier, with gross profit nearly halving amid continued weakness in its property operations. The group posted a net loss of HK$214.1 million, narrower than the prior year, but results were heavily hit by substantial impairments on goodwill, other receivables and investment properties, highlighting ongoing asset quality pressures and underlining the financial strain on the developer as it navigates a difficult real estate market.

The company also recorded lower selling and administrative expenses and a modest income tax credit, but financing costs remained high and profitability was further undermined by valuation losses on its investment properties. While some reversal of expected credit losses on trade receivables provided minor relief, the scale of impairments indicates continued headwinds for stakeholders, signalling persistent balance-sheet risks and limited near-term earnings visibility for the Hong Kong-listed developer.

More about Richly Field China Development Limited

Richly Field China Development Limited is a Hong Kong-listed property developer with operations conducted through its subsidiaries. The group focuses on investment properties and related real estate activities in mainland China, deriving revenue from property sales and associated services in a challenging market environment.

Average Trading Volume: 514,892

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: HK$74.68M

Learn more about 0313 stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Venus Medtech Explores Up to RMB500 Million Investment via Shares and Convertible Bonds
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

Venus Medtech (Hangzhou), Inc. Class H ( (HK:2500) ) just unveiled an update.

Venus Medtech (Hangzhou) Inc. has signed a non-binding investment term sheet with Hangzhou Hi-Tech, Hangzhou Yingzhiqin and other potential investors for a prospective capital injection of up to RMB500 million. The funding would be raised through a mix of new share subscriptions and new convertible bonds, with pricing linked to the recent average trading price of the company’s Hong Kong-listed shares and capped at HK$2.5 per share.

Under the proposal, investors would subscribe for new shares at 100% of the 20-day average closing price and for new convertible bonds at 110% of that average, both subject to the price cap, potentially providing Venus Medtech with additional growth capital and balance sheet flexibility. The parties have agreed to pay RMB100 million in earnest money within seven business days, which is refundable if the transactions fail due to the company’s fault, but the deal remains subject to definitive documentation, regulatory approvals and shareholder mandate, meaning there is no assurance it will proceed and investors are urged to act cautiously.

More about Venus Medtech (Hangzhou), Inc. Class H

Venus Medtech (Hangzhou) Inc. is a China-based medical technology company focused on developing and commercializing cardiovascular implantable devices and related interventional solutions. Listed in Hong Kong, the company targets both domestic and international markets for advanced heart valve therapies and other structural heart disease treatments.

Average Trading Volume: 1,147,077

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: HK$542.4M

data.title: Diana Shipping Extends Genco Tender Offer and Keeps Sweetened Bid in Play
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

Diana Shipping ( (DSX) ) just unveiled an update.

Diana Shipping Inc., already the largest shareholder of Genco Shipping & Trading, has extended its tender offer to acquire all remaining Genco shares it does not own to July 10, 2026, from a prior deadline in late June. As of June 26, 2026, investors had tendered 10.6 million Genco shares, representing 28.4% of the outstanding float not held by Diana, underscoring notable investor interest in a potential combination.

The bid, recently enhanced in an offer to Genco’s board, values Genco at $27.34 per share through a mix of $24.80 in cash and one Diana share, supported by $1.433 billion in fully committed bank financing with no financing condition. The proposal, which represents a substantial premium to Genco’s undisturbed share price and net asset value, signals Diana’s push to consolidate its position in the dry bulk shipping market and raises the stakes for Genco’s board and shareholders as they weigh a premium offer amid strong sector asset values.

Spark’s Take on DSX Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, DSX is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weakening fundamentals versus prior-cycle peaks (contracting revenue, lower margins) and a levered balance sheet with low current returns, despite still-positive recent free cash flow. Technical signals also reflect weak near-term momentum. Positives from the latest earnings call—high utilization, meaningful 2026 charter coverage, and improved liquidity/deleveraging—provide some support, but valuation (high P/E with a modest yield) limits upside.

To see Spark’s full report on DSX stock,
click here.

More about Diana Shipping

Diana Shipping Inc. is a global provider of shipping transportation services focused on the dry bulk sector, operating a fleet of owned and bareboat chartered-in vessels. Its ships are primarily employed on short to medium-term time charters, carrying commodities such as iron ore, coal and grain along worldwide shipping routes.

Average Trading Volume: 823,127

data.title: Kona BidCo Lifts Zalaris Stake Above 86% Ahead of Planned Delisting
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

Zalaris ASA ( (DE:81Y) ) has issued an announcement.

Kona BidCo AS, a close associate of Zalaris chair Fredrik Gyllenhammar Raaum, has increased its stake in Zalaris ASA to about 86.69% of the company’s issued share capital and voting rights through a mandatory offer at NOK 100 per share. Including treasury shares, this translates to approximately 87.90% control, consolidating effective majority ownership.

The offer period runs until 14 July 2026, after which the bidder intends to seek delisting of Zalaris shares from Euronext Oslo Børs, signaling a likely move toward taking the company private. Minority shareholders now face a narrowing window to tender their holdings, and a delisting would materially reduce liquidity and public market access for remaining investors, aligning the process with Norwegian and EU disclosure regulations.

More about Zalaris ASA

Zalaris ASA is a Norwegian company whose shares are listed on Euronext Oslo Børs, operating within the broader financial and corporate services market. Its shareholder base includes institutional and international investors, and the company is subject to Norwegian securities regulation and EU market abuse rules.

Average Trading Volume: 22,639

Current Market Cap: NOK2.18B

data.title: IM Cannabis Raises US$225,000 in Convertible Note and Warrant Financing
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

IM Cannabis Corp ( (IMCC) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On July 1, 2026, IM Cannabis Corp. closed a US$225,000 private placement with an institutional investor via a convertible note carrying an 8% annual interest rate and a 10% original issue discount. The note is repayable only in common shares, with a conversion price tied to the lower of a fixed US$0.152 per share or a market-based formula, subject to a floor and a 4.99% ownership cap, and the company plans to use the US$202,500 in net proceeds for general corporate purposes.

In connection with the financing, IM Cannabis issued a warrant allowing the investor to buy up to 1,483,386 common shares at C$0.22, exercisable immediately and expiring in July 2031, with the securities subject to a four-month hold. The company also committed to reserve sufficient shares and file a resale registration statement with the U.S. SEC, underscoring its continued reliance on equity-linked financing to support operations amid regulatory, market and geopolitical risks in its core Israel and Germany markets.

Spark’s Take on IMCC Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, IMCC is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial performance (recurring losses, negative equity, and a return to cash burn) and bearish technical conditions (price below all key moving averages with negative MACD). Valuation contributes little support because the negative P/E reflects ongoing unprofitability and no dividend yield is provided.

To see Spark’s full report on IMCC stock,
click here.

More about IM Cannabis Corp

IM Cannabis Corp. is a medical cannabis company operating in Israel and Germany, focused on building and scaling innovative, tech-enabled businesses across global markets. Through subsidiaries, it imports and distributes medical cannabis, runs retail pharmacies and online platforms in Israel, and supplies German pharmacies via Adjupharm GmbH for medical patients.

data.title: Rio Tinto Updates Total Voting Rights and Share Capital Structure as of Late May 2026
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

An announcement from Rio Tinto Limited ( (AU:RIO) ) is now available.

Rio Tinto plc reported that, as of 29 May 2026, its issued share capital comprised 1,256,038,584 ordinary shares of 10p each, with 992,389 of these held in treasury and therefore excluded from dividends and voting. This left a total of 1,255,046,195 voting rights, a key reference figure for investors and other stakeholders monitoring disclosure thresholds under U.K. transparency rules.

The company also noted the existence of a Special Voting Share and a DLC Dividend Share that support joint voting and economic alignment between Rio Tinto plc and Rio Tinto Limited within their dual-listed structure. In addition, it highlighted that 371,821,214 publicly held Rio Tinto Limited shares remain outside the plc share capital, underscoring the scale and complexity of the group’s cross-market equity base and governance framework.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:RIO) stock is a Hold
with a A$171.50 price target.
To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Rio Tinto Limited stock,
see the AU:RIO Stock Forecast page.

More about Rio Tinto Limited

Rio Tinto Limited, part of the Anglo-Australian mining group Rio Tinto, operates in the global resources sector with a focus on iron ore, copper and other minerals critical to industrial and energy markets. The company is structured as part of a dual-listed companies arrangement with Rio Tinto plc, designed to align the economic interests and voting rights of shareholders across the U.K. and Australia.

Average Trading Volume: 1,292,176

Current Market Cap: A$235.3B

data.title: Actelis Restructures White Lion Financing with New Exchange
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

The latest announcement is out from Actelis Networks, Inc. ( (ASNS) ).

On April 10, 2026, Actelis Networks was delisted from the Nasdaq Capital Market, triggering a delisting-related pricing mechanism in its common stock purchase agreement with White Lion Capital. On July 1, 2026, the parties signed an Exchange and Amendment Agreement under which Actelis agreed to issue 9,850,000 shares and related warrant securities to compensate White Lion for rights tied to commitment shares and delisting penalties.

The amendment restructures White Lion’s purchase mechanisms into revised rapid and regular purchase options, setting discounted prices based on market trading with a fixed $0.005 deduction that does not adjust for any reverse stock split. Actelis also agreed to pause new purchase notices for 30 days and to reconfigure its registration statements to deregister 10,000,000 shares and newly register 6,000,000 shares plus the amendment securities, reshaping its financing flexibility while the stock remains off Nasdaq.

Spark’s Take on ASNS Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ASNS is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by very weak profitability and sustained cash burn, despite improved leverage. Technicals also reflect a pronounced downtrend with negative momentum. Corporate events are mixed, with OTCQB trading and delisting-related risks offsetting potential strategic upside from the proposed acquisition and buyback expansion, while valuation metrics provided do not offer clear support.

To see Spark’s full report on ASNS stock,
click here.

More about Actelis Networks, Inc.

Actelis Networks, Inc. operates in the telecommunications and networking sector, providing solutions based on its common stock financing arrangements to support its capital needs. The company has previously relied on an equity line of credit structure with investor White Lion Capital LLC, tied to its listing status on the Nasdaq Capital Market and subsequent trading in its common stock.

Average Trading Volume: 1,601,558

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: $1.96M

data.title: Box shareholders approve equity plan and board directors
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

Box ( (BOX) ) has shared an update.

On June 25, 2026, Box, Inc. held its annual meeting of stockholders, where investors approved an amendment to the company’s Amended and Restated 2015 Equity Incentive Plan to add 7,200,000 shares of Class A common stock reserved for issuance. Stockholders also ratified Ernst & Young LLP as independent auditor for the fiscal year ending January 31, 2027, with strong participation representing 83.30% of eligible voting power, underscoring broad shareholder engagement in Box’s governance and compensation structure.

At the same meeting, shareholders elected three Class III directors—Sue Barsamian, Jack Lazar, and Steve Murphy—to terms running until the 2029 annual meeting, reinforcing continuity on the board. Investors further approved, on an advisory basis, the compensation of the company’s named executive officers, and backed the expanded equity plan despite a significant minority opposing it, indicating mixed but ultimately supportive sentiment toward Box’s use of stock-based incentives to attract and retain talent.

The most recent analyst rating on (BOX) stock is a Buy
with a $37.00 price target.
To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Box stock,
see the BOX Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on BOX Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, BOX is a Outperform.

The score is driven primarily by strong cash flow and improved profitability, supported by upbeat guidance and margin/FCF momentum from the latest earnings call. The main constraints are balance-sheet leverage and only modest TTM revenue growth, while technicals are moderately supportive and valuation appears reasonable on the provided P/E.

To see Spark’s full report on BOX stock,

Box, Inc. is a cloud content management company that provides software and services for secure file storage, collaboration, and workflow automation, primarily targeting enterprises that need to manage and share content across geographically dispersed teams and regulated industries.
